differential_diagnoses: Primary Angiitis of the Central Nervous System (PACNS)
next_steps: MRI brain with gadolinium and vessel wall imaging
Repeat lumbar puncture with cytology, flow cytometry, and IgG index/oligoclonal bands
Test serum and CSF for inflammatory markers including IgG4, ANA, ENA, and anti-amyloid-beta antibodies
Consider empiric corticosteroid trial if biopsy is pending or inconclusive and clinical status declines
Consultation with rheumatology and neuro-oncology for specialized testing
